description: This lesson introduces the fundamentals of baking, including measuring ingredients, mixing techniques, and understanding baking times.

steps.instruction: Gather all your ingredients: flour, sugar, eggs, butter, and baking powder.
Preheat your oven to the required temperature.
Measure and mix dry ingredients in one bowl and wet ingredients in another.
Combine both mixtures and stir until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and place it in the oven.
Bake for the specified time and check for doneness.
